title: Summarizing Technical Documents
scenario: Given a technical document of approximately 500 words, write a summary of no more than 150 words that captures the main points, including key technical terms and definitions.
constraints: Must include key technical terms and definitions
Summary should be no more than 150 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count and structural requirements.
Verify that the summary accurately captures the main points of the technical document.
Check if the technical terms mentioned in the summary match the ones provided in the document.
Ensure the summary accurately defines key technical terms and concepts.
